content_body:
Nothing says fall quite like a trip to the pumpkin patch in Blue Ridge, Ga. 

A staple of the fall season, picking pumpkins is a timeless tradition that is fun for all ages. Whether you want to turn them into jack-o-lanterns or delicious pies, cookies, and other goodies, there is no time like October to choose the perfect pumpkin. Here in Blue Ridge, we have two favorite pumpkin patches we recommend for creating great fall memories!

1. Mercier Orchards

Much like their famous U-Pick Apples, Mercier Orchards offers U-Pick Pumpkins every fall. This season, you can pick your perfect pumpkin on October 22nd, 23rd, 29th, and/or 30th from 10 AM to 4 PM. Head out to 8660 Blue Ridge Drive for some fall fun with the whole family! You can visit their website here.

2. The Red Apple Barn

Another popular apple orchard, The Red Apple Barn is home to a pumpkin patch, too! You can head out into the field to pick your pumpkin, or choose from the pile of pumpkins. Whether your perfect pumpkin is small, medium, or so large you need help carrying it to the car, you're sure to find the right one from theiur vast selection. With options like traditional orange, Cinderella, and white ghost pumpkins, you can stick to tradition or try something new this year! The patch is open seven days a week, and there is no charge to visit the pumpkin patch near Blue Ridge, Ga. Visit their website for more details.
title: Pumpkin Picking in Blue Ridge
